title: State Management
subtitle: Service-based state, NgRx store, effects, and the signals store
description: State management is one of the most debated topics in Angular. Master service-based state with BehaviorSubject for simpler apps, NgRx for complex shared state, and the modern signals-based NgRx store — and know when each approach is appropriate.
learningOutcomes: Implement feature state with BehaviorSubject services without NgRx
Understand NgRx unidirectional data flow: store, actions, reducers, selectors
Write memoized selectors with createSelector and compose them
Build NgRx Effects for async operations with proper error handling
Normalize entity collections with NgRx Entity
Use NgRx Component Store for local/feature state
